fields.explainZh: 存储控制器的固件版本。
存储控制器的状态。采集值和转译值对应为:0=Good,1=Bad。
风扇的是否在位。采集值和转译值对应为:0=NO,1=YES。
风扇的状态。采集值和转译值对应为:0=UnHealthy,1=Healthy。
网卡的接口类型。采集值和转译值对应为:0=Copper,1=Fiber,2=Serdes,3=Copper—Fiber,255=Unsupported。
网卡的状态。采集值和转译值对应为:0=Healthy,1=UnHealthy,255=N/A。
物理存储的状态。采集值和转译值对应为:0=OK,1=Impending failure,255=Unsupported。
供电体的状态。采集值和转译值对应为:0=Healthy,1=Minor Problem,2=Major Problem,3=Critical Problem,4=Unknown Problem。
传感器的状态。采集值和转译值对应为:0=Healthy,1=Minor Alarm,2=Major Alarm,3=Critical Alarm,4=Unknown Alarm。

传感器的类型。采集值和转译值对应为:1=temperature,2=voltage,3=Current,4=fan,5=physical security,6=plat security violation attempt,7=processor,8=power supply,9=power unit,10=cooling device,11=other units-based sensor,12=memory,13=driver slot,14=POST Memory Resize,15=System Firmware Progress,16=Event Logging Disabled,17=Watchdog 1,18=System Event,19=Critical Interrupt,20=Button/Switch,21=Module/Board,22=Microcontroller/Coprocessor,23=subcard,24=Chassis,25=Chip Set,26=Other FRU,27=Cable/Interconnect,28=Terminator,29=System Boot Initiated,30=Boot Error,31=OS Boot,32=OS Critical Stop,33=Slot/ConnectorV,34=System ACPI Power State,35=Watchdog 2,36=Platform Alert,37=Entity Presence,38=Monitor ASIC/IC,39=LAN,40=Management Subsystem Health,41=Battery,42=Session Audit,43=Version Change,44=FRU State,192=SMI Timeout,193=Self Test,194=HOST event,195=BIOS Startup,196=Sensor Self Event,197=PEM Voltage Falling,198=Board Poweron Failure,240=Hot Swap State,241=IPMB Link Status。
服务器的电源状态。采集值和转译值对应为:0=Power Off,1=Power On。
测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
